misc.title: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released
misc.text: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released a breathtaking view of Antarctica Community note: This image is not from NASA. No such photo was released by Artemis II. It appears to be a computer-generated illustration, similar to past CGI examples falsely claimed as NASA photos. nasa.gov/artemis-ii/ earthobservatory.nasa.gov/images apnews.com/article/Fact-c… — https://nitter.net/astrooalert/status/2048190323495403835#m

misc.text: The highly anticipated Jump Press only announced what we already knew about #BlackClover ... GIGA cover & lead colour page, interview with Tabata-sensei & Gakuto Kajiwara (Asta voice actor) & a small artboard goodie that comes with GIGA & some raffle.

misc.text: Witch Hat Atelier #5 Full Staff: SB/ED: Kazuki Kawagoe CAD: Kairi Unabara AD: Atsuko Nakajima, Haruhito Takada, Akane Ogawa, Fuminori Ishimaru, Rina Ogawa, Miyuki Nakayama, Yousuke Murata, Haruyoshi Nomura KA: Haruyoshi Nomura, WILLIAM LEE, Satoshi Nakano, Isao Nanba, Hayato Torii, Taichi Hattori Fuuma Urata, Tekuma Shinohara, Tomoka Tamatani, Hijiri Iguchi, Håvard Skjeggestad Dale, Kazumi Satou, Shinji Matsuda, Asahi Yamada, Yukina Furunaga, Rino Shouda, Saurabh Singh, Ayaka Shimoji, Vercreek, Shoutarou Tamemizu, Hajime Nihira, Tetsuta Sannomiya, Yasuo Fujii, Shinga Nakamura, Naporin, kASS CHAPA, dino, Daniel Monteiro, Satoru Kimura, Yin, Atsumi Ichimura, Naomi Mikamiyama, Yuuichirou Iida, Iida Mono, Nana Higashida, Momoka Uchida, Hitoshi Maki, Iyumi Kane, ふぃめら (?) 42 2nd KAs Ass ED: 長谷川あい (?)
